import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";

import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Send Document for Signing"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/api/v1/user-documents/send-mail/"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Send email notifications to all signers to sign the document.

Use the `reference_signer_id` values obtained from the **Add Signers** response in the `data` array.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>

</Heading>
